name: talentos-track-b
description: TalentOS external extensions and adapters (Track B)

scripts.test: npx tsc -p packages/readiness-engine/tsconfig.test.json && npx tsc -p packages/ats-adapters/tsconfig.json && node --test packages/readiness-engine/dist/test/readiness.test.js && node -e "require('./packages/ats-adapters/dist/canary.js')"
scripts.ci: npm run build && npm test && npm run test:integration && node tools/check-no-submit.mjs && node tools/check-adapter-versions.mjs
